title: U.S. property prices and shelter costs
description: FHFA measures purchase prices; BLS shelter, rent, and owners' equivalent rent measure housing-service costs.
plainLanguageSummary: FHFA measures purchase prices; BLS shelter, rent, and owners' equivalent rent measure housing-service costs.
howToRead: Compare direction, turning points, and sustained divergences. Use the tooltip for exact values and observation dates; visual alignment alone does not establish causation.

calculation.formula: Published indices and explicitly labelled derived changes; no interpolation across native frequencies.
calculation.explanation: FHFA measures purchase prices; BLS shelter, rent, and owners' equivalent rent measure housing-service costs.
calculation.example: A value at date t uses only observations dated t or earlier unless the chart explicitly labels a visual shift.

patternsToWatch: Turning points or divergences that repeat across historical episodes
limitations: FHFA measures purchase prices; BLS shelter, rent, and owners' equivalent rent measure housing-service costs.
sourceNotes: Official U.S. source distributed through Federal Reserve Economic Data

series.label: FHFA U.S. purchase-only house price index
series.source: Official U.S. source distributed through Federal Reserve Economic Data

methodology.formula: Published indices and explicitly labelled derived changes; no interpolation across native frequencies.
methodology.notes: FHFA measures purchase prices; BLS shelter, rent, and owners' equivalent rent measure housing-service costs.
